title: glochidion rubrum var. brevistylum
intro: Glochidion rubrum var. brevistylum, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, is a type of Euphorbiaceae plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Glochidion rubrum var. brevistylum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to act as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into infusions, decoctions, or topical creams for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
